programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Alien Base
programme.desc: Abandoned hangers and bunkers populate a bizarre facility in the middle of nowhere, but among them are other structures whose purpose are oddly obscured; experts investigate a highly-classified military cover-up with extraterrestrial objectives.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Hitler's Escape Enigma
programme.desc: Adolph Hitler disappears from the world in an apparent suicide at the end of WWII, but theories of his possible escape continue to circulate; experts use cutting-edge forensic science to examine remains that could finally solve the mystery of his fate.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Hitler's Escape Enigma
programme.desc: Adolph Hitler disappears from the world in an apparent suicide at the end of WWII, but theories of his possible escape continue to circulate; experts use cutting-edge forensic science to examine remains that could finally solve the mystery of his fate.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Alien Base
programme.desc: Abandoned hangers and bunkers populate a bizarre facility in the middle of nowhere, but among them are other structures whose purpose are oddly obscured; experts investigate a highly-classified military cover-up with extraterrestrial objectives.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Big Bang
programme.desc: Explorers tackle the mysteries of life itself leading us to worlds never before seen.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Expanded Edition: First Second
programme.desc: Travel back to the first second of the universe's existence with the latest science and information.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monsters of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The center of the Milky Way is home to strange and deadly phenomena that we don't yet understand, but using the latest science, experts are revealing how the supermassive black hole our galaxy's core shapes life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Night Shift
programme.desc: Single mother Barbara Nunn relocates to Florida, but she struggles to find her way. After she lands a job at a local diner, it appears her troubles are finally behind her. But then one night, a surprise confrontation with customers ends in murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When 71-year-old Orville Head passes away, no one questions the death of an elderly man with health problems. But when a tip comes in suggesting foul play, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Wishing Well Mystery
programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: Field of Nightmares
programme.desc: The execution-style murder of a beloved maternity ward nurse in a cornfield shakes up a small Indiana town.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Wishing Well Mystery
programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: Field of Nightmares
programme.desc: The execution-style murder of a beloved maternity ward nurse in a cornfield shakes up a small Indiana town.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: The Last 24: Somebody Knows Something
programme.desc: In rural Michigan, 34-year-old Deborah Boothby is run over on the highway, and for nine years the case goes unsolved. That is, until a team of detectives review the evidence and the hit-and-run cold case becomes a murder investigation.

programme.title: The Last 24: No Sleep for the Wicked
programme.desc: A Louisiana man's shooting death is linked to an affair and an unusual insurance policy.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Manner of Murder
programme.desc: Everyone in town adores Sara Dixon, and police are baffled when they discover her shot dead in her sleep. Their only clue: Christmas tinsel that the killer tracked in. Rumors of a secret family feud will soon reveal a story of monstrous betrayal.

programme.title: Shattered: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: 1993. Rockville, MD. A woman is shocked to discover her sister and nephew killed in cold blood... unwittingly, a daughter becomes a pawn in a dark and brutal murder plot... and a prosecutor makes it his personal mission to bring a killer to justice.

programme.title: Shattered: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: 1981. A teenager forms a search party to find his missing 5-year-old sister. 1995. A mother frantically searches for her young son who disappears while playing near the river, and an officer prays when she recognizes the prime suspect in both cases.

programme.title: Disappeared: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Mother of three, Holly Cantrell, is seen on security video exiting the Oklahoma hospital where she works but never returns home. Police learn Holly was keeping secrets, and her loved ones wonder if those had anything to do with her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: No GoodByes
programme.desc: A mother arrives home to have lunch with her teenage daughter and walks into a nightmare she will never forget.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Secrets on the Lake
programme.desc: In 2000, 31-year-old Mike Williams vanished while duck hunting on a Florida lake. His boat and his shotgun were found, but not his body. Seventeen years later, a violent kidnapping led detectives to suspects who had been there all along.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Puzzle in Pieces
programme.desc: In Johnstown, NY, a young man's disrespectful behavior has his friends seeing red. The group plots to teach him a lesson, but things get horrifically out of hand- kicking off a murder mystery more intricate than any jigsaw puzzle.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Pride and Payback
programme.desc: Competition among personal trainers at a high-end Florida gym is intense. A new general manager comes aboard to steady the ship, but tension lies just beneath the surface. A volatile mix of pride and rage ignites a horrific and deadly chain reaction.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Granny Gets a Gun
programme.desc: A woman disapproves of her granddaughter's new boyfriend and plots to eliminate him.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got That Tough Girl Look
programme.desc: Juanita Liebman and two friends plan to rob a man at Biketoberfest in FL, but it goes wrong and the three kick him into a coma. Juanita tries to lay low, but her epilepsy requires medical attention. The cops stake out the pharmacy to apprehend her.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Roll the Dice
programme.desc: With 41 arrests and no convictions, Philip Williams had no worries that stabbing his ex in a parking lot would give him any trouble. But when he became a wanted man, he hit the road. Surviving on his gambling wins, Williams kept on the move.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Plastic Surgery
programme.desc: Courtenay Savage is an ex-cop with a loaded gun aimed at a friend's trailer. She has no idea she is caught on tape. After an arrest and posting bail, she goes on the run, leaving ties to the police department and the sex industry.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Pen Pal
programme.desc: Brenda Wynn is out of prison, and wants a new life. But when a co-worker steels her money, she snaps and hits him with her car. Wynn does all she can to stay out of jail by using fake credit cards and conning men into giving her money.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: From LA to Lake Tuscaloosa
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa. They find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team works in Roanoke, Virginia, at the Noland Sign Company. On a windy day, they salvage metal lettering, copper cupolas and vintage plumbing.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Century Ago
programme.desc: When Jennifer and Paul's home inspection report came back with only minor repairs, Paul tackled them with enthusiasm. It was not long before they began to suspect that the home inspector had missed some much bigger problems.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Stitch in Time
programme.desc: Andrew and Melissa had a home inspection before they bought the house, but the inspector missed signs of obvious neglect that could lead directly to much bigger issues.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: No Breathing Room
programme.desc: James and Doreen were thrilled to be able to afford a house for their growing family. Unfortunately the deal closed before they could read their home inspection report. After moving in they discover problems that made parts of the house off limits.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Something Old, Sump-thing New
programme.desc: Steven and Jennifer have been burned by a bad home inspection before and decided to upgrade to a new house, confident that it would have fewer problems. Now they need Mike to do a Holmes Inspection to bring the rest of their problems to light.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Terminated
programme.desc: Gail and Kevin were thrilled to find a house they could afford just minutes from their daughter's school. The inspector saw asbestos wrapped ducts, but the house was beautifully renovated so there was no need to disturb them.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Endless Pasta-bilities
programme.desc: There's something about pasta that's exciting, and Eddie Jackson shares a combination of savory sauces and a variety of textures for this ever-evolving ancient dish. No matter what, pasta has endless pasta-bilities!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Martha's Vineyard
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Martha's Vineyard, the island community off the coast of Cape Cod, Massachusetts, where the fresh local catch is delivered to restaurants each day.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tahiti
programme.desc: From a Polynesian twist on ceviche to freshwater shrimp coated in a sweet, coconut-curry sauce, Andrew sets sail on a culinary voyage through the signature dishes of Tahiti.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrew explores the cuisine of Tuscany, Italy, which is rooted in the tradition of 'cucina povera' or food made with local, high quality ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Charleston, South Carolina
programme.desc: Andrew steps beyond the carriage rides and stuffy plantation tours to see what really makes the Charleston food scene tick.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Undiscovered Hawaii
programme.desc: Andrew wants to find out what Hawaiians really like to eat. From dried octopus bile sac to crispy pork intestine, Andrew gets a taste of Hawaii's other side.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Maury: 22 Years of Lies ... Is This Man My Father?

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly's New Shoes
programme.desc: Molly enjoys a shopping spree at the mall after Mike storms off over a disagreement.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ice Cubed
programme.desc: Guilt gets the better of Carrie when she seeks refuge from a blizzard in a church.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Lost Baggage
programme.desc: Max tags along with Caroline as she travels to Los Angeles on a film studio's dime to discuss the idea of making her riches-to-rags life story into a movie. While there, Max loses her luggage but finds a new crush.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Maz Jobrani.

programme.title: Black-ish: Unkept Woman
programme.desc: Dre and Bow's morning routine with the kids is changing now that Bow is taking some time off work. Meanwhile, Junior bonds with Diane now that he is in charge of driving his siblings to school.

programme.title: Black-ish: 40 Acres and a Vote
programme.desc: With Obama leaving office and the upcoming election, Dre finds a new candidate to believe in: Junior. Junior is running for class president and is overqualified for the job, but he just can't seem to connect with his fellow classmates.

programme.title: Walker: Pilot
programme.desc: Widower and father of two Cordell Walker returns to Austin after being undercover for two years to find there's work to be done at home.

programme.title: Legacies: We're Not Worthy
programme.desc: Alaric sends the students off-campus for their first-ever field day, but the students are left scrambling to guess which one of them may be a worthy opponent when a medieval monster arrives with a challenge.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Stock Tip
programme.desc: Kramer warns Jerry against investing in the stock market when he gets a hot tip from George.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Fire
programme.desc: Jerry decides to get his revenge on a heckler by disturbing her at work. George panics during a fire at his girlfriend's son's party and saves himself.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think You Offended Don
programme.desc: Judith is pregnant with a baby girl and Alan is convinced that he is the father. Meanwhile, Jake is in a contentious mood and Charlie thinks he knows why.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Bodacious Vidalia
programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: This Is This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: The Dropouts are thrilled when they book a gig at a Flyers charity carnival, and Adam uses the opportunity to make his very first rockumentary. Since Barry doesn't want to miss out on the fun, he forces his way into the band.

programme.title: Mom: Sparkling Water and Ba-Dinkers
programme.desc: Bonnie fears she's become undesirable when she catches Adam smoking pot before sex and Christy tries to smooth things between them.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Shadowboxing
programme.desc: When Mandy job shadows Mike at The Outdoor Man, her textbook conflict resolution skills differ from Mike's experience-based approach; and she unintentionally causes a dispute between Chuck and Joe.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Pilot
programme.desc: Mike plays Cupid for Mandy by setting her up on a blind date with one of his employees who he thinks would be perfect for her, but Mike's set-up gets off track when Kyle accidentally meets Kristin.

programme.title: Mom: Soapy Eyes and a Clean Slate
programme.desc: Christy is on a journey to right the wrongs of her past but she has a blind spot when it comes to Baxter. Following Christy's example, Bonnie decides to come clean with Alvin about the terrible things she did to him over the years.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Don't Let the Dogs Out/ Divorced Woes
programme.desc: A man sues for veterinary bills; a man sues for car repairs.

programme.title: Protection Court: Baby Daddies

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Relaxative Tea Revenge/ Love Lost Over Tennis
programme.desc: A roommate sues over an ambulance bill; a private event goes wrong.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Vaught vs. Lindsey
programme.desc: A New Haven man wants his name taken off the birth certificate if he is not the father of a nine-month-old baby.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Winters vs. Cawley
programme.desc: He caught her in bed with another man and now a couple from MO comes to Paternity Court for a DNA test and lie detector test.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Kathy says Nicole never repaid the loan given to her for the purchase of a mobile home. Nicole insists that she satisfied the loan by a combination of cash, money sent through an app, and weed.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A mother is suing her daughter for vandalizing her car and falsely reporting her to child protective services for abusing her children.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
